title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
summary: OpenAI said GPT-5.6 will become the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Copilot Chat, and Cowork. Microsoft will access the models through the OpenAI API as part of the rollout.
friendlySummary: Microsoft’s AI assistant for Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and other work tools will use OpenAI’s new GPT-5.6 model.
whyItMatters: This puts the newest model improvements directly into mainstream productivity software. For many workers, the impact of frontier AI will arrive through better drafting, analysis, presentation building, and coordination inside tools they already use.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make everyday office tasks easier, especially writing, data analysis, and preparing presentations.
